        rw [take_append_of_le_length] <;> simp_all
      · simp [partialSums]; omega
    · next h =>
      simp at h
      rw [take_append_of_le_length (by omega), ih (i - l.length), findIdx_map]
      have : (fun x => decide (l.length + x > i)) = (fun x => decide (x > i - l.length)) :=
        funext fun _ => by congr; omega
      rw [this]
      let idx := (map length L).partialSums.findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i - l.length))

      congr 1
      · cases idx <;> simp_all
      · congr 1
        · cases idx <;> simp_all
        · omega

  | cons l L ih =>
    simp only [flatten_cons, partialSums_cons, map_cons]
    by_cases h : i < l.length
    · have : findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i)) (map (l.length + ·) (map length L).partialSums) = 0 := by
        rw [findIdx_eq] <;> grind
      simp [findIdx_cons, this, take_append_of_le_length, h]
    · have : findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i)) (map (l.length + ·) (map length L).partialSums) =
             findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i - l.length)) (map length L).partialSums := by
        rw [findIdx_map]; congr; funext x; simp; omega
      simp only [findIdx_cons, this, Nat.add_sub_cancel]
      rw [take_append_of_le_length_left (by omega)]
      rw [ih]
      simp [take_cons_succ]
      congr 2
      omega

induction L generalizing i with
  | nil => simp
  | cons l L ih =>
    simp only [flatten_cons, map_cons, partialSums_cons, findIdx_cons, zero_lt_one,
      Bool.false_eq_true, ↓reduceIte, Nat.not_lt_zero]
    by_cases h : i < l.length
    · rw [if_pos h]
      simp only [Nat.add_zero, Nat.sub_zero, take_zero, flatten_nil, append_nil,
        getElem?_cons_zero, Option.getD_some]
      rw [take_append_of_le_length (Nat.le_of_lt h)]
    · rw [if_neg h]
      simp only [Nat.add_succ_sub_one, findIdx_map]
      have : (fun x => decide (l.length + x > i)) = (fun x => decide (x > i - l.length)) := by
        funext; congr; omega
      rw [this, take_append_of_le_length (Nat.le_of_not_lt h), ← ih (i - l.length)]
      have : 0 < findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i - l.length)) (map length L).partialSums := by
        cases (map length L).partialSums <;> simp_all; omega
      rw [show findIdx _ _ = (findIdx _ _) - 1 + 1 by omega]
      simp [length_append, append_assoc]; congr 1; omega

induction L generalizing i with
  | nil => simp
  | cons l L ih =>
    simp only [flatten_cons, partialSums_cons, findIdx_cons, Function.comp_def]
    split
    · simp_all
    · rw [findIdx_map]
      by_cases h : i < l.length
      · have : (map length L).partialSums.findIdx (fun x => decide (x + l.length > i)) = 0 := by
          cases (map length L).partialSums <;> simp_all; omega
        simp [h, this, take_append_of_le_length]
      · have : (fun x => decide (x + l.length > i)) = (fun x => decide (x > i - l.length)) := by
          funext; simp; omega
        rw [this, take_append, take_of_length_le (by omega), ih (i - l.length)]
        have : 0 < (map length L).partialSums.findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i - l.length)) := by
           cases (map length L).partialSums <;> simp_all; simp; omega
        have : (map length L).partialSums.findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i - l.length)) - 1 + 1 =
               (map length L).partialSums.findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i - l.length)) := by omega
        simp [← this, take_succ, getElem?_cons_succ]
        congr 2
        omega

induction L generalizing i with
  | nil => simp
  | cons l L ih =>
    simp only [flatten_cons, partialSums_cons, findIdx_cons, zero_gt, decide_false, Bool.false_or,
      map_map, Function.comp_def]
    by_cases h : i < l.length
    · have : findIdx (fun x => decide (l.length + x > i)) (map length L).partialSums = 0 := by
        cases L <;> simp_all [partialSums_cons]
      simp [h, this]
      rw [take_append_of_le_length] <;> simp_all
    · simp only [not_lt] at h
      have : (fun x => decide (l.length + x > i)) = (fun x => decide (x > i - l.length)) := by
        funext; congr; omega
      rw [this, ih (i - l.length)]
      simp [h]
      congr 1
      · congr 1; simp; omega
      · congr 1; simp; omega

induction L generalizing i with
  | nil => simp
  | cons l L ih =>
    simp only [flatten_cons, partialSums_cons, findIdx_cons, Function.comp_def]
    rw [Bool.decide_false (by omega), cond_false, Nat.add_sub_cancel]
    split_ifs with h
    · have : (map length L).partialSums.findIdx (fun x => decide (l.length + x > i)) = 0 := by
        cases (map length L).partialSums <;> simp_all; omega
      simp [this, take_append_of_le_length, h]
    · rw [take_append, take_of_length_le (by omega)]
      have : (map length L).partialSums.findIdx (fun x => decide (l.length + x > i)) =
             (map length L).partialSums.findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i - l.length)) :=
        List.findIdx_congr (fun _ _ => by simp; omega)
      rw [this]
      have : (map length L).partialSums.findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i - l.length)) =
             ((map length L).partialSums.findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i - l.length)) - 1) + 1 := by
        cases (map length L).partialSums <;> simp_all; omega
      rw [this, take_cons_succ, flatten_cons, append_assoc, getElem?_cons_succ]
      congr 1
      rw [ih (i - l.length)]
      congr <;> omega

induction L generalizing i with
  | nil => simp
  | cons l L ih =>
    simp only [flatten_cons, partialSums_cons, map_map, Function.comp_def]
    rw [findIdx_cons]
    split <;> rename_i h
    · simp [h, take_append_of_le_length (le_of_lt h)]
    · simp only [h, decide_false, cond_false, Nat.succ_sub_succ, Nat.sub_zero]
      rw [findIdx_map]
      have : (fun x => decide (l.length + x > i)) = (fun x => decide (x > i - l.length)) := by
        funext; simp; omega
      rw [this, take_append_of_le_length (le_of_not_lt h), ih (i - l.length)]
      have : 0 < (map length L).partialSums.findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i - l.length)) := by
        cases (map length L).partialSums <;> simp_all; omega
      simp [take_cons_succ, flatten_cons, getElem?_cons_succ, this]
      congr <;> omega

induction L generalizing i with
  | nil => simp
  | cons l L ih =>
    simp only [flatten_cons, partialSums_cons, findIdx_cons, findIdx_map, Function.comp_def]
    split <;> rename_i h
    · have : findIdx (fun x => decide (l.length + x > i)) (map length L).partialSums = 0 := by
        rw [findIdx_eq_zero]
        use 0
        simp; omega
      simp [h, this, take_append_of_le_length]
    · have h' : l.length ≤ i := by simp at h; exact h
      rw [take_append_eq_append_take _ _ _ h']
      have idx_eq : findIdx (fun x => decide (l.length + x > i)) (map length L).partialSums =
                    findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i - l.length)) (map length L).partialSums := by
        congr; funext; simp; omega
      rw [idx_eq]
      have j_eq : findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i - l.length)) (map length L).partialSums =
                  (findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i - l.length)) (map length L).partialSums - 1) + 1 := by
        cases (map length L).partialSums <;> simp [findIdx_cons]; omega
      conv in (take _ (l :: L)) => rw [j_eq, take_cons_succ]
      rw [flatten_cons, ih (i - l.length)]
      simp [append_assoc]
      congr 2; omega
